hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|ts|css)$' && lsof -ti:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1 && (cd /Users/sashavee/Documents/av-studio && node screenshot.mjs 2>/dev/null) && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Screenshots updated after your edit. You MUST now use the Read tool to review check-hero.png, check-problem.png, check-process.png, check-work.png, check-pricing.png, check-contact.png before responding. Do not say the UI looks good without reviewing these images."}}' || true
